clear.description: Clears the data. If another thread tries to read the value, it will block until that operation is done.

load.description: Loads the data. If the data is currently being written, this will lock and wait until the write operation is completed.

store.description: Writes the given data to the internal storage. If another thread tries to read the value, it will block until that operation is done.

storeWithCopy.description: Creates a copy of the data and writes the copy to the data storage. If another thread tries to read the value, it will block until that operation is done.

tryLoad.description: Loads the data if the lock can be gained or returns a given default value if the data is currently being written.
